title: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) & Tree-of-Thoughts (ToT)
description: Architect prompting structures like Chain-of-Thought (CoT) that guide models through reasoning steps. Master Tree-of-Thoughts (ToT) to enable models to explore multiple reasoning paths and self-correct.
objectives: Architect prompting structures like Chain-of-Thought (CoT) that guide models through reasoning steps.
Master Tree-of-Thoughts (ToT) to enable models to explore multiple reasoning paths and self-correct.
